---
name: 🌍 New Translation
about: Contribute a translation for a new language
title: "[Translation] Add {language} support"
labels: i18n, good first issue
assignees: ''
---

## 🌍 Language

- **Language:** [e.g., Spanish, Japanese, Arabic]
- **Locale code:** [e.g., es, ja, ar]

## 📋 Scope

What are you translating?

- [ ] UI strings (`/messages/{locale}.json`)
- [ ] AI Seeds lessons (`content/programs/ai-seeds/lessons/{locale}/`)
- [ ] AI Sprouts lessons (`content/programs/ai-sprouts/lessons/{locale}/`)
- [ ] Other program: ___

## 👤 Translator Info

- [ ] I am a native speaker of this language
- [ ] I am a fluent speaker of this language
- [ ] I have professional translation experience

## 📝 Notes

Any additional context about the translation (e.g., regional dialect, terminology choices).

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I will follow the existing file naming conventions
- [ ] I will preserve all MDX frontmatter keys in English
- [ ] I will translate all user-facing content, not code/variable names
